summary.what: fix(report): include contributors in standup input
summary.why: Standup promised contributor-aware reporting but its legacy text input omitted the persisted contributor snapshot.
summary.how: Switched the template to the existing narrative JSON projection, bumped its version, and added a regression test that rejects entries_summary.

notes: Conduit v0.25.0 integration exposed the mismatch. Reused ProjectEntries rather than expanding entries_summary, keeping contributor attribution on the report-profile path.
